allow: PowerShell($dom = Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\hr_dom.html" -Raw -Encoding UTF8; $hash = if \($dom -match 'id="fairHash">\([^<]+\)<'\) { $matches[1] } else { 'MISSING' }; Write-Output "fairHash: $hash"; Write-Output \("odds rows: " + \([regex]::Matches\($dom, 'class="pickable"'\)\).Count\); Write-Output \("rankBoard items: " + \([regex]::Matches\($dom, 'rb-pos'\)\).Count\); Write-Output \("numchips: " + \([regex]::Matches\($dom, 'numchip'\)\).Count\); $cd = if \($dom -match 'id="countdown">\(\\d+\)<'\) { $matches[1] } else { 'MISSING' }; Write-Output "countdown: $cd"; Write-Output \("helpModal visible: " + \($dom -match 'id="helpModal" class="modal"'\)\))
